title: Introduction to AI Systems
scope: History, LLMs, the 2026 AI stack, ethics and safety including EU AI Act, NIST RMF, White House EO. No coding.

assessments.title: Specification Portfolio
assessments.requirement: Submit 5 task specifications (health, transport, education, food, scheduling) using formal spec language. Each spec must include: input parameters, expected output format, boundary conditions, and at least one negative test case. Attach one Excalidraw flowchart with decision branches and loop constructs clearly labelled. Graded on: technical precision, testability, and completeness of boundary handling.
